permission.comment: Processing and deriving new works is permitted, provided the anonymisation duty is fulfilled.

obligation.comment: The consumer MUST anonymise all personally-identifiable and farm-identifiable information before any processing, analysis, or publication. This includes ranch names, GPS coordinates (must be generalised to county/region level), and any field-level identifiers. This is a contractual obligation — enforcement relies on the Data Sharing Agreement, not technical controls.
The consumer must notify the data provider before publishing any derived dataset or analysis, even after anonymisation.

prohibition.comment: Raw (non-anonymised) data may never be redistributed.
